calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Trust To Change Beneficiaries Based On Consent Of Trustors And Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Mar-07-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Julia Burt, via Zoom, for Emily White and Zachary White, Petitioners.

The court advises that it appears as though the Trustee has the authority to divide the trust as authorized in Article 9(q). Ms. Burt reports on the actions that have contributed to the filing of the instant petition and confirms that the request is seeking an order to terminate the existing trust and establish two, new separate trusts. The court advises that it will review the proposed order and that it is inclined to grant the relief as requested.

After additional discussion, the court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
